name: Fried Beancurd in Red Chile Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the Korean red chile flakes, tamari or soy sauce, water, sesame oil, minced garlic, sliced scallions, fresh chile (minced), and sugar (if using). Set aside until the tofu is fried.
2. Cut the tofu into serving portions or large chunks and pat dry with paper towels.
3. Heat 1-2 inches of vegetable oil in a skillet or wok over moderately high heat.
4. Fry the tofu pieces until golden brown on all sides, turning as necessary.
5. Remove the tofu from the oil and place it in a deep serving dish or shallow bowl.
6. Pour the chile mixture over the tofu, coating each piece evenly.
7. Sprinkle with crushed toasted sesame seeds and serve warm with hot steamed rice and assorted vegetable relishes or dressed salad greens.
8. Leftovers can be coarsely chopped and mixed with some corn kernels or other vegetables for a delicious filling in flour tortillas (cold or hot).
